raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, XXXX called me and left a voicemail at XXXXXXXX XXXX  stating that if I did not return their call within two business days, they would be unable to assist me regarding my case ending in XXXX. I called them back the same day at XXXXXXXX XXXX at XXXX and spoke with XXXX, a dispute XXXX. She assured me that my case would not be closed since I had contacted them. I also requested written confirmation of my call to ensure there would be no issues, but she stated that it would only be notated on my account. 

Despite XXXXXXXX XXXXXXXX I received the same voicemail again today, XX/XX/year>, at XXXXXXXX XXXX, while at work, stating the same warning about my case being closed. XXXX had previously assured me that I would not receive another call and that my case would remain open, yet the voicemail contradicts this. 

I am concerned about the inconsistency in communication and would like written confirmation that my case remains open to prevent any misrepresentation or closure due to an internal error.
